meaning: n.障碍,梁木v.妨碍,(马)不肯前进
examples: Even biology undergraduates may balk at animal experiments.
To emancipate all mankind, we will balk at no sacrifice. even that of our lives.
Would you balk at funding a program that spends 23% of its budget to raise money?
They may not balk at the assignment itself but instead may challenge the methodology.
